features.featureTitle: Update the frontend commission history table (CommissionHistoryTable.tsx) and earnings summary (EarningsSummary.tsx) to reflect the corrected commission rate array: [9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1] percent for levels 1 through 9. Ensure per-level commission amounts displayed to the user are computed as the applicable percentage of the total collection at that level (number of members at the level × ₹2750), not as a flat per-member fee.

Update the HomePage commission level breakdown section to display the corrected commission rates: Level 1 = 9%, Level 2 = 8%, Level 3 = 7%, continuing down to Level 9 = 1%, each described as a percentage of total collection at that level.
